title: 10-Pack Ballpoint Purple Pen Set - Medium Point 1.0mm for Effortless Writing & Comfortable Grip - Ball Point Pens Ideal for School, Exams, Home or Work Stationery Supplies
features: ULTIMATE QUALITY: EziGlide's unique ballpoint pen tips are precisely engineered to ensure you enjoy the ultimate easy writing experience - for all your writing, drawing and colouring needs.
INK TECHNOLOGY: EziGlide Pens contain an advanced ink formula to provide you with an ultra-smooth writing sensation along with quick drying to prevent smudging on the page.
SOLID COLOUR BARREL: The EziGlide Pen barrels have a solid colour barrel which matches the colour of the ink within to help differentiate what is in your Pen Pot!
SAFETY: EziGLIDE's ventilated safety cap conforms to BS7272 standard, making them perfect for use in schools. The lid fits snuggly on the top to prevent misplacement while the pens are in use.
PURPLE PENS: Pack of 10 - Medium Point Nib (1.0mm) The Eziglide pen nib is fixed to ensure the pen can`t be taken to bits, designed with schools in mind to prevent unscrewing or general fiddling!
